name: Swing Factory Golf
address: 742 S Hill St Suite 500, Los Angeles, CA 90014
about: Swing Factory Golf is an indoor golf studio located in Downtown Los Angeles, featuring state-of-the-art golf simulators. The venue offers a 3,500+ square foot facility with three simulator bays, allowing players to enjoy golf regardless of weather. It operates on a reservation-only basis but also accommodates walk-ins. The space is equipped with high-end technology, including Uneekor XO Eye 2 launch monitors and is suitable for both casual play and serious practice sessions, with pricing starting at $60 per hour.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor Eye XO2 simulator technology for accurate tracking
24/7 access available with a membership for ultimate flexibility
Ability to play 18 holes in just one hour, perfect for busy schedules

simulator_hardware.notes: Photometric camera system with 3 cameras for seamless lefty or righty play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use the high-quality equipment provided at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks, so it's best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can play 18 holes in one hour on the simulators, though a 20 handicap player typically takes about an hour for a full round.

faq.question: Is Swing Factory Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes golfers of all skill levels, including children.
